summary:
The agent acknowledges that the provided evidence contains no information about the elasticity of metallic alloys. Despite this, it concludes that nickel-titanium (option D) possesses superior elasticity based on established clinical and engineering principles, selecting D as the best-supported choice within the context implied by the question.  

This summary focuses exclusively on clinically relevant aspects related to material performance under stress and selection criteria in biocompatible device applications.
